title: Master Serverless Function Lifecycle
description: Optimize serverless function cold-starts using provisioned concurrency and efficient bundle sizes. Differentiate between the 'Initialization' and 'Execution' phases of serverless functions and their implications. Implement strategies to minimize latency in serverless function invocations.
objectives: Optimize serverless function cold-starts using provisioned concurrency and efficient bundle sizes.
Differentiate between the 'Initialization' and 'Execution' phases of serverless functions and their implications.
Implement strategies to minimize latency in serverless function invocations.
